testcase.name: test_fix1_reading_generation_succeeds_or_503

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 200 (success) or 503 (graceful). Got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 in (200, 503) + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_focused_retest.py:50: in test_fix1_reading_generation_succeeds_or_503 assert r.status_code in (200, 503), ( E AssertionError: Expected 200 (success) or 503 (graceful). Got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 in (200, 503) E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

skipped.message: Prior reading not generated (likely upstream 503); cannot test quota gate.

testcase.name: test_fix2_stripe_login_and_create_session

failure.message:
AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
